globalRule.description: Identifies records where Engine Type or Model Name is null, or both Plant ID and Dealer ID are null, or Vehicle Status is null, violating model-specific constraints or logistics data.
globalRule.expression: SELECT * FROM databuckk8s.new_data_set.auto_manufacturing_150_records WHERE (Engine_Type IS NULL OR Model_Name IS NULL) OR (Plant_ID IS NULL AND Dealer_ID IS NULL) OR Vehicle_Status IS NULL

globalRule.description: Identifies records where the VIN length is not exactly 17 characters, or if VIN, Production ID, Model Name, or Model Year is null, indicating an invalid or incomplete VIN.
globalRule.expression: SELECT * FROM databuckk8s.new_data_set.auto_manufacturing_150_records WHERE LENGTH(VIN) != 17 OR VIN IS NULL OR Production_ID IS NULL OR Model_Name IS NULL OR Model_Year IS NULL

globalRule.description: Identifies records where the Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) is duplicated across production records, indicating a uniqueness violation, despite having valid production details.
globalRule.expression: SELECT t1.* FROM databuckk8s.new_data_set.auto_manufacturing_150_records AS t1 JOIN (SELECT VIN, COUNT(*) AS vin_count FROM databuckk8s.new_data_set.auto_manufacturing_150_records GROUP BY VIN HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) AS t2 ON t1.VIN = t2.VIN WHERE t1.Production_ID IS NOT NULL AND t1.Model_Name IS NOT NULL AND t1.Production_Date IS NOT NULL

globalRule.description: Flags any vehicle production record where Production ID, VIN, Model Name, Production Date, or MSRP_USD is found to be null, violating mandatory field requirements.
globalRule.expression: SELECT * FROM databuckk8s.new_data_set.auto_manufacturing_150_records WHERE Production_ID IS NULL OR VIN IS NULL OR Model_Name IS NULL OR Production_Date IS NULL OR MSRP_USD IS NULL

globalRule.description: Identifies manufacturing and distribution records where the Vehicle Model Name is null, but other key identifiers like Production ID, Plant ID, and Vehicle Status are present.
globalRule.expression: SELECT * FROM databuckk8s.new_data_set.auto_manufacturing_150_records WHERE Model_Name IS NULL AND Production_ID IS NOT NULL AND Plant_ID IS NOT NULL AND Vehicle_Status IS NOT NULL

globalRule.description: Flags records where the Vehicle Model Name is missing, despite having valid Production ID, VIN, and Plant ID, indicating incomplete manufacturing data.
globalRule.expression: SELECT * FROM databuckk8s.new_data_set.auto_manufacturing_150_records WHERE Model_Name IS NULL AND Production_ID IS NOT NULL AND VIN IS NOT NULL AND Plant_ID IS NOT NULL

globalRule.description: Identifies records where Production_Date is in the future or its year exceeds the Model_Year, or if either date or year is not provided.
globalRule.expression: SELECT * FROM databuckk8s.new_data_set.auto_manufacturing_150_records WHERE Production_Date > CURRENT_DATE() OR EXTRACT(YEAR FROM Production_Date) > Model_Year OR Production_Date IS NULL OR Model_Year IS NULL OR VIN IS NULL OR Production_ID IS NULL

globalRule.description: Records where the year extracted from Production_Date does not match the Model_Year, or either date or year is missing, for valid production and VIN records.
globalRule.expression: SELECT * FROM databuckk8s.new_data_set.auto_manufacturing_150_records WHERE (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM Production_Date) != Model_Year OR Production_Date IS NULL OR Model_Year IS NULL) AND Production_ID IS NOT NULL AND VIN IS NOT NULL

globalRule.description: Flags any manufacturing or distribution record where the Model_Name is missing, which is a mandatory field for Production_ID and VIN.
globalRule.expression: SELECT * FROM `databuckk8s.new_data_set.auto_manufacturing_150_records` WHERE Model_Name IS NULL AND Production_ID IS NOT NULL AND VIN IS NOT NULL

globalRule.description: Identifies vehicle production records where critical mandatory fields such as Production_ID, Model_Name, VIN, or Plant_ID are missing.
globalRule.expression: SELECT * FROM `databuckk8s.new_data_set.auto_manufacturing_150_records` WHERE Production_ID IS NULL OR Model_Name IS NULL OR VIN IS NULL OR Plant_ID IS NULL

globalRule.description: Flags records where the Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) appears more than once, indicating a violation of uniqueness for Production_ID and Model_Name.
globalRule.expression: SELECT t1.* FROM `databuckk8s.new_data_set.auto_manufacturing_150_records` AS t1 JOIN (SELECT VIN, COUNT(*) AS vin_count FROM `databuckk8s.new_data_set.auto_manufacturing_150_records` GROUP BY VIN HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) AS t2 ON t1.VIN = t2.VIN WHERE t1.Production_ID IS NOT NULL AND t1.Model_Name IS NOT NULL

globalRule.description: Flags records where the Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) length is not 17 characters and the Plant_ID is missing, indicating critical data issues for the Production_ID.
globalRule.expression: SELECT * FROM `databuckk8s.new_data_set.auto_manufacturing_150_records` WHERE LENGTH(VIN) != 17 AND Plant_ID IS NULL AND Production_ID IS NOT NULL

globalRule.description: Identifies records where the Production_Date year is later than the Model_Year, suggesting an invalid future date for the VIN.
globalRule.expression: SELECT * FROM `databuckk8s.new_data_set.auto_manufacturing_150_records` WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM Production_Date) > Model_Year AND VIN IS NOT NULL

globalRule.description: Records where the year of the Production_Date does not match the Model_Year, indicating a data inconsistency for the Production_ID.
globalRule.expression: SELECT * FROM `databuckk8s.new_data_set.auto_manufacturing_150_records` WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM Production_Date) != Model_Year AND Production_ID IS NOT NULL
